ogTitle: Prevelly vs Pumphreys Bridge: Climate Safety

heading: Prevelly vs Pumphreys Bridge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Prevelly, Western Australia and Pumphreys Bridge, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pumphreys Bridge has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Prevelly (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Prevelly or Pumphreys Bridge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Prevelly has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Pumphreys Bridge scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Prevelly scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Pumphreys Bridge scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Prevelly or Pumphreys Bridge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pumphreys Bridge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
